name: ICAHN ENTERPRISES L.P.
summary: Icahn Enterprises L.P. is a Delaware master limited partnership and diversified holding company headquartered in Sunny Isles Beach, Florida. It operates seven reporting segments: Investment, Energy, Automotive, Food Packaging, Real Estate, Home Fashion, and Pharma. The company employs an activist investment strategy, acquiring undervalued companies and driving operational changes. Key investment positions include AEP, Southwest Gas, EchoStar, Centuri Holdings, and IFF. Energy and Automotive segments account for the majority of consolidated net sales.

products.name: Investment Funds
products.description: Private investment funds investing proprietary capital in undervalued securities using activist, value-based strategies.

products.name: Energy Segment (CVR Energy)
products.description: Energy operations acquired via controlling interest in CVR Energy, Inc. in 2012.

products.name: Automotive Segment
products.description: Automotive products and services generating significant consolidated net sales.

products.name: Food Packaging Segment
products.description: Food packaging operations, accounting for majority of revenues from customers outside the United States.

products.name: Real Estate Segment
products.description: Real estate leasing operations contributing to consolidated revenues.

products.name: Home Fashion Segment
products.description: Home fashion products sold as part of the diversified holding company portfolio.

products.name: Pharma Segment
products.description: Pharmaceutical operations as one of seven continuing reporting segments.
